rumor.detail: Chiefs agreed personal terms with Maxwele; deal dependent on Golden Arrows approval

newIntel.reasoning: New as of Jun 1, 2026 (after May 25 latest rumor). Personal terms agreement represents material escalation from previous 'advanced talks' status. First confirmation Chiefs have reached agreement-level with player.

rumor.detail: Belgian club scouted Cissé; tabled formal offer after positive evaluation

newIntel.reasoning: New as of May 31, 2026 (after Apr 9 latest rumor). First concrete European club interest with scouts deployed and formal offer tabled. Expands club interest from regional African/SA focus to Belgian Pro League.

needsReview.detail: May 29 Kick Off report: Motaung Jnr contacted Mngqithi; greenlight to leave Arrows; listed amongst options. May 27 ESPN/Afrik-Foot: no formal approach yet made.
needsReview.reason: Conflicting timeline: May 27 states 'no formal approach' but May 29 states Motaung Jnr made contact and listed him as option. Both dates within 2-day window. May 29 source (Kick Off) appears to reference same contact event as an update but introduces uncertainty on whether 'contact' = 'formal approach.' Already captured in existing rumors (May 29, May 26, May 27, May 25). No material new development beyond existing reporting.
